global_context.scene_description: Top-down photograph of a newspaper obituary page resting on a kitchen table. The paper has realistic newsprint texture, slight yellowing, a visible fold crease running vertically down the center, and a light coffee stain in the upper-right corner. One obituary is the focal point — centered on the page, framed with a thin black border like a traditional obituary block. Where the deceased's portrait would be, there is instead a crumpled, coffee-stained HVAC invoice/quote with the bold text '$15,000' clearly visible on it, photographed as if it were a portrait. Below the 'portrait' is the obituary headline reading 'IN LOVING MEMORY' in traditional serif font, followed by 'The $15,000 AC Quote' and the dates '2015 — 2026'. Below that, body text of the obituary reads: 'Passed away peacefully after being beaten by ASH Cooling & Heating. Survived by homeowners who now have $5,000 back in their pockets. In lieu of flowers, please send your quote to ASH.' A ceramic coffee cup sits in the upper-left corner of the frame, partially cropped. A pair of reading glasses rests to the right of the obituary. Morning light from a window casts soft, diagonal shadows from the coffee cup and glasses. Across the very bottom of the entire image — OVERLAID on top of the newspaper scene, breaking the newspaper frame — is a solid red rectangular banner occupying the bottom 12% of the image. Inside the red banner, bold white sans-serif text reads 'BEAT MY QUOTE →' on the left and the ASH Cooling & Heating logo appears on the right.

lighting.source: Natural morning window light from upper-left

composition.camera_angle: Direct top-down, slight angle for depth
composition.framing: Medium close — newspaper fills ~85% of frame, red banner occupies bottom 12%
composition.depth_of_field: Deep — most of scene in focus
composition.focal_point: The crumpled HVAC quote serving as the obituary 'portrait' with '$15,000' visible
composition.notes: Reserve bottom 12% of frame for the solid red CTA banner. Obituary occupies middle 60% of frame. Coffee cup and glasses frame the composition in upper corners.
